auth.signInToAccount: Sign in to your MyndBBS account
auth.createAccountToJoin: Create an account to join the conversation
auth.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters, include uppercase, lowercase, number & special char.
auth.completeSecurityVerificationFirst: Please complete the security verification first.
auth.passwordLengthError: Password must be between 8 and 128 characters
auth.passwordComplexityError: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
auth.passkeyCancelled: Passkey authentication was cancelled or timed out.
auth.passkeyFailed: Failed to authenticate with passkey. Ensure your device supports it.
auth.passkeyError: An error occurred during passkey login

mockPosts.title: Welcome to MyndBBS! Here is our design philosophy.
mockPosts.author: Admin
mockPosts.excerpt: We are building a clean, light, and secure forum. In this post, we discuss why we chose Next.js and how we implemented WebAuthn for passwordless login.

mockPosts.title: How to properly type Prisma queries in a monorepo?
mockPosts.author: DevGuy
mockPosts.excerpt: I'm struggling with sharing Prisma types between my backend and frontend packages. Does anyone have a good pattern for this?

mockPosts.title: Share your minimal desk setups for 2026
mockPosts.author: Minimalist
mockPosts.excerpt: Since we're all about that clean/light aesthetic here, let's see where you write your code. Post your desk photos below!

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.enterTotpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your Authenticator App.
twoFactor.scanQrHint: Scan this QR code with your Authenticator App (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy).

settings.manageProfile: Manage your public profile and login details.
settings.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep your current password.
settings.manageSecurity: Manage your two-factor authentication and passwordless login methods.
settings.passkeysDesc: Passkeys allow you to securely sign in using your device's fingerprint, face scan, or screen lock.
settings.confirmRemovePasskey: Are you sure you want to remove this passkey?
settings.totpDesc: Use an authenticator app (like Google Authenticator or Authy) to generate one-time codes for 2FA.
settings.confirmDisableTotp: Are you sure you want to disable Authenticator App (TOTP)?
settings.manageSessions: Manage devices currently logged into your account.
settings.confirmRevokeSession: Are you sure you want to sign out of this session?
